data.body: DECOMPOSED (config-loop, 2026-06-16, user-authorized). EV-2 bundled 6 removals across ~11 files + 2 test-suite migrations — too large for one rigorous pass. Split into 3 concrete, independently-shippable, non-breaking sub-tickets (each blocks 77aa; discovered_from 77aa): EV-2c [38c7] dead internal flags + subprocess self-resolve (_REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO, TICKET_SYNC_CMD, REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE param-ify, REBAR_TICKET_CLI, TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH) -> DONE (commit ca39db45); EV-2a [dab5] remove PROJECT_ROOT (REBAR_ROOT only) across ~23 src reads + ~14 test files -> OPEN; EV-2b [096c] remove TICKET_CMD validate injection seam + materialize validate tests in-process -> OPEN. 77aa closes when EV-2a + EV-2b land. Rationale: PROJECT_ROOT and TICKET_CMD each carry their own test migration, so each warrants its own validated iteration.
